meanings.definition: be in a state of movement or action
examples: The room abounded with screaming children
It was a sight to make one's hair uprise!

meanings.definition: have or be thickly covered with or as if with bristles
react in an offended or angry manner
examples: He bristled at her suggestion that he should teach her how to use the program

meanings.definition: having or covered with protective barbs or quills or spines or thorns or setae etc.
examples: a horse with a short bristly mane
